### [Constants](/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGBitmapInfo/floatInfoMask#Constants)

[`static var alphaInfoMask: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/alphainfomask)The alpha information mask. Use this to extract alpha information that specifies whether a bitmap contains an alpha channel and how the alpha channel is generated.Deprecated[`static var floatComponents: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/floatcomponents)The components of a bitmap are floating-point values.[`static var byteOrderMask: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/byteordermask)The byte ordering of pixel formats.Deprecated[`static var byteOrderDefault: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/byteorderdefault)The default byte order.[`static var byteOrder16Little: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/byteorder16little)16-bit, little endian format.[`static var byteOrder32Little: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/byteorder32little)32-bit, little endian format.[`static var byteOrder16Big: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/byteorder16big)16-bit, big endian format.[`static var byteOrder32Big: CGBitmapInfo`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgbitmapinfo/byteorder32big)32-bit, big endian format.
